parameters.jsonBody: ={{ ({ channel: 'whatsapp', provider: 'n8n', to_address: $json.customer_phone || '00000000000', subject: $json.reply_subject || null, body: $json.reply_text, payload: { source: 'clara', lead_id: $json.lead_id || null, conversation_id: $json.conversation_id || null, message_id: $json.message_id || null, intent: $json.intent || null, route_target: $json.route_target || null, context: $json.context || {} } }) }}

={{ ({ domain: 'automation', provider: 'n8n', direction: 'inbound', event_type: $json.event_type || 'automation.trigger', entity_type: $json.entity_type || null, entity_id: $json.lead_id || null, correlation_id: $json.conversation_id || null, payload: { customer_name: $json.customer_name, customer_phone: $json.customer_phone, intent: $json.intent, route_target: $json.route_target, message_text: $json.message_text, context: $json.context || {} }, metadata: { workflow: $workflow.name, handoff: true } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ ok: true, workflow: $workflow.name, lead_id: $json.lead_id || null, customer_phone: $json.customer_phone || null, intent: $json.intent || null, route_target: $json.route_target || null, reply_text: $json.reply_text || null }) }}
